title: Custody Dispute — Ideologue Parent
brief: A 41-year-old mother took her 7-year-old daughter from school and is barricaded in her car in the school parking lot. She believes the court system is corrupt and has refused to comply with a custody order. Child appears calm. No weapons. Subject has a history of anti-government social media posts.

demands.text: I want full custody of my daughter
I want a lawyer present before I talk to anyone

opening_message: The courts are corrupt! They gave my daughter to a man who doesn't even care about her! I'm not giving her back until someone fixes this!
